alternateCalendars.label: 2026-27 Challenger Early College High School Calendar

seoTitle: Catawba County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Catawba County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 including first day, holidays, teacher workdays, Spring Break dates, printable PDF, and calendar downloads for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
calendarNotes: Catawba County Schools starts the 2026-2027 traditional school year on August 24, 2026 and ends on May 21, 2027 with a 3-hour early dismissal. Winter Holidays run December 23-January 1, and Spring Break runs April 12-16. The calendar also lists optional and mandated teacher workdays, elementary-only workdays, holidays, early dismissals, and weather make-up dates. A separate Challenger Early College High School calendar is available from the district.

customSections.label: Printable Catawba County Schools Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families who prefer a paper copy can print the official Catawba County Schools 2026-2027 traditional calendar PDF. The printable version includes holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, early dismissals, weather make-up dates, and other important school dates.

customSections.label: Catawba County Schools Calendar Types Explained
customSections.content: Catawba County Schools uses different calendars depending on school type and program. Most students follow the Traditional Calendar summarized on this page, while Challenger Early College High School has a separate 2026-2027 schedule published by the district. Families should confirm which calendar applies to their student before planning vacations, childcare, transportation, appointments, or school activities.

rows: Use this page for districtwide first day, holidays, workdays, Spring Break, early dismissals, and last day.
Challenger Early College High School students
Use the separate official calendar PDF linked by Catawba County Schools.
Students in activities, testing, athletics, or special programs
Confirm event times, make-up days, and school-level changes through CCS or the assigned school.

customSections.label: Important Catawba County Schools Dates for Parents
customSections.content: These are the calendar dates families most often use for school-year planning. The table adds context for why each date matters instead of only repeating the date from the official calendar.

rows: Students on the Traditional Calendar return to school.
A midweek holiday period that affects travel, childcare, and work schedules.
The longest winter holiday window, with students returning after the New Year period.
The main spring travel and childcare planning period for Traditional Calendar families.
The final student day includes a 3-hour early dismissal.

customSections.label: Catawba County Schools Teacher Workdays Explained
customSections.content: Teacher workdays are scheduled days when staff complete planning, professional development, grading, or administrative work. Catawba County Schools lists optional teacher workdays, mandated teacher workdays, elementary-only workdays, and weather make-up workdays on the 2026-2027 calendar. For family planning, these dates should generally be treated as student no-school dates unless CCS announces a make-up change or a school-specific exception.

groups.label: Parent planning notes
items: Optional and mandated teacher workdays can affect childcare, transportation, and after-school plans.
Elementary-only workdays may not apply the same way for middle and high school students.
Weather make-up workdays may change if CCS adjusts the calendar after winter weather or emergency closures.

customSections.label: Catawba County Schools Closure Information
customSections.content: This calendar shows scheduled school holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, and planned early dismissal dates. Weather closures, emergency changes, and same-day school closing announcements are issued separately by Catawba County Schools. Families searching for whether CCS is closed today or tomorrow should check official district alerts before changing transportation, childcare, or work plans.

customSections.label: Before You Plan Vacations Around the CCS Calendar
customSections.content: Families in Catawba County, Newton, Hickory, and surrounding communities often use the CCS calendar to plan travel, childcare, appointments, and work schedules. Before booking vacation dates, review the official Spring Break window, Winter Holidays, Thanksgiving Break, teacher workdays, early dismissal dates, and any school-specific calendar that applies to your student.

groups.label: Check before making plans
items: Confirm whether your student follows the Traditional Calendar or the Challenger Early College calendar.
Review teacher workdays and elementary-only workdays because some no-school dates apply differently by grade span or program.
Check the official CCS calendar page again before long trips because weather make-up days and district revisions can change schedules.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Catawba County Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day for students is Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Catawba County Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 12 through Friday, April 16, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Catawba County Schools in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Friday, May 21, 2027, with a 3-hour early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does CCS have a Challenger Early College calendar for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Catawba County Schools publishes a separate 2026-27 Challenger Early College High School calendar linked as an alternate calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Catawba County Schools have school tomorrow?
calendarFaqs.a: This page shows planned calendar dates, not real-time closures. Families should check Catawba County Schools announcements for weather closures, emergency schedule changes, or same-day updates.

calendarFaqs.q: Are teacher workdays no-school days for Catawba County students?
calendarFaqs.a: Optional, mandated, and elementary-only teacher workdays are generally student no-school planning dates unless Catawba County Schools announces a make-up change or school-specific exception.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Catawba County Schools release students for summer in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Friday, May 21, 2027, and the calendar notes a 3-hour early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Catawba County Schools calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the PDF link on this page or the official Catawba County Schools calendar page to view the published 2026-2027 traditional calendar PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the Catawba County Schools 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The Catawba County Schools 2026-2027 traditional calendar includes approximately 180 scheduled instructional days based on the published calendar records. Families who need an official attendance-day count should verify it with CCS.

calendarFaqs.q: What calendar do most Catawba County Schools students follow?
calendarFaqs.a: Most Catawba County Schools students follow the Traditional Calendar summarized on this page. Challenger Early College High School students should use the separate official Challenger Early College calendar.
